meaning: n.荷兰石竹,康乃馨,粉红色
examples: We all wear a green carnation.
And see, I made this carnation myself.
I bought some carnation for my mother.
That's eight times the price of Carnation dry milk and a pinch of baking soda.
In 2004 the London-based Red Carnation boutique hotel chain took over the resort and started a long-term upgrade.
